titleStmt.title: SII 24.209: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 209. (A.R. No. 44 of 1936-37.) EAST WALL OF THE FOURTH PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Records an exchange of land between Malaikkiṉiyaniṉṟāṉ-bhaṭṭaṉ and Gōmaḍattu Nārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭaṉ of Vikramaśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in connection with certain endowment to the colony formed by Kāliṅgarāya in the name of Perumāḷ i.e. Jaṭāvarmaṉ Tribhuvanachakravartin Vīra Pāṇḍya in the 10th year of his reign. A portion of the land so exchanged is said to have belonged formerly to a certain Kaṇḍiyadēvar. Among the boundaries of the land is mentioned a village by name Tuppanāyakkar-agaram. The details of date viz., Kuṁbha, ba. 13, Wednesday, Uttirāḍam, correspond to A.D. 1307, February 1; ·80; ·51, if meant for the regnal year 10, given in l. no. 7 of the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmat kittikku mel koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvira pāṇṭiya teStone peeled off. [ kumbha nāyaṟṟuapara] pakṣattu trayodaśiyum putaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ vaṭakarai rā[ja*]rā[ja*] vaḷanāṭṭup pāccilk kūṟṟattu kiḻpalāṟṟu brahmadeśam perumāḷ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam vikramacoḻac caturvedimaṅkalattu tirumeṟkkoyil kāśyapaṉ malaikkiṉiya niṉṟāṉ paṭṭaṉeṉ Ivvūrk komaṭattu nārāyaṇapaṭṭarkku nāṉ parivattaṉai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu . Ivūr tiruvaraṅkavatikku kiḻakku vikkirama
coḻa vāykkālukku teṟkku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcatirattu puṉceykaḷil nāyaṉār Aḻapayaperumāḷ tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy Eṉ perāl variyaṟṟup potukiṟa periyatoṭṭam puṉcey Uttecam Oḻukiṉapaṭi ṉilam Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻmukkāle cinnattiṉāl viriviṉpaṭi kuḻiyum Itiniṉṟa teṅku Irupattiraṇṭum kāliṅkarāyar vaikkiṟa Akaram nārāyaṇapaṭṭar tuppanāyakkar Akarattukkuk kiḻa
teṇāya(k)kar viṭa veṇṭukaiyil Itukku Uḷkkiṭai yāyk kiṭanta Ippuṉceyum teṅkukaḷum cera viṭa veṇṭukaiyil centa Iṭatte kirivattittuk koḷva teṉṟu jiyar tirumuka(va)m koyil koḷkkiṟa periya perumāḷ dāsar kaṭaiyiṭum varukaiyil Ippaṭikku Ūril mahājanaṅkaḷ mahāniyogam Eḻutittarukaiyil kāliṅkarāyar perumāḷ tirunāmattāl vaikkiṟa Akarattukku Iṉnārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ viṭṭa
puṉceykaḷuṭaṉe ṉāṉum puṉceyyum teṅkukaḷum viṭṭu Inṉārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eṉakku talaimāṟāka viṭṭu nāṉ tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāykaiykkoṇṭa Ivatikku meṟkku Ivvāykkālukku teṟku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟc catirattu paṭṭa pāḻttiṭalil tentalaiyil Ivarutāṉa puṉceyyil teṟk kaṭaiya nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻmukkāle ciṉṉattiṉāl viriviṉpaṭi kuḻiyum Itiniṉṟa teṅkuka(ḷ)ḷil
viṭṭa teṅku Irupattiraṇṭum Āka puṉ(c)ceykaḷum teṅkukaḷum kaiyk koṇṭu Iṉṉārāyaṇa paṭṭarkku nāṉ viṭṭa periya toṭṭa puṉceyyum Atiṉiṉṟa teṅku Irupattiraṇṭum parivattaṉaiyāy Ivarkku dānādhamana vikrayaṅkaḷukkurittāvatākavum Ippaṭi samvadittu parivattaṉai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Iṉnārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉukku kāśyapaṉ malaikkiṉiya niṉṟā ṉeṉ Ivai malaikkiṉiyaniṉṟāṉ paṭṭaṉ
Ivarkaḷ Aruḷicceya Ipramāṇam Eḻutiṉamaiy(k)ku Ivvūrkkaṇakku neṟ(k) kuppai(y) Uṭaiyāṉ koyilppiḷḷai Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ coṭṭai ciṅkappirāṉ paṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ coṭṭai śrī vāsu devapaṭṭaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kārampicceṭṭu yajñasiṅha bhaṭṭaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ikkuṭi mātavapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ piṟāntūr vaṉ kuṟukoṭṭi mutta tiruvu�
Ivvakarap per muppattiraṇṭukkum Ivai(y) kuṭuttamai(y)kku Ivai(y) periya perumāḷāṉa kāliṅkarāyar Eḻuttu § tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam vikramacoḻac carup petimaṅkalattu pattāvatu pacāna mutal Uṭaiyār kāliṅkarāyar perumāḷ tirunāmattāl vaitta Akarattukku viṭṭa viḷainilam puṉcey Uḷḷiṭṭa nattattukkum Itiṉiṉṟa teṅku Uḷḷiṭṭa pala vṛkṣaṅkaḷukkum Ūrvaḻi pūṇṭa mutalukku viniyokam sabhāviṉiyokattukkum pūṇṭa kaḻitta
komaṭattu nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ paṟṟil viṭṭa kucavaṉ tiṭal Uḷḷiṭṭa puṉcey kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟu Eḻupatum nikki niṉṟa teṅkukaḷil vari pūṇṭa teṅku Eḻupatu māviraṇṭum ṉelli Oṉṟum kaṇṭiyatevar paṟṟil viṭṭa puṉceyttalai pāṭu puṉcey kuḻi Aṟupattunālum Ivarkku nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ pratikṣetramāka viṭṭu Ivakarattu vāstuvukku Okku puṉceyil viṭṭa kuḻi muppatum vaṭatalaittaṭi nilattu viṭṭa kuḻi Aṉpatum Āka viḷainilam kuḻi Eṇpatum
puṉcey kuḻi toḷāyirattu muppattiṉālum teṅku Eḻupatum māviraṇṭum ṉelvi Oṉṟum Āṟṟukkuppokiṟa peruvaḻi Akarattukku Uḷḷum vaḻiyu mākaiyil Itu talaimāṟāka peruvaḻi kiḻakke viṭaveṇṭukaiyil viṭṭa Ivar nattattukku vāykkāl pukuṉta Iṭattum viṭṭa kuṟukoṭṭak kecava paṭṭaṉ kamukam nilattuk kuḻi Eḻaraiyum nārāyaṇa paṭṭa meṟppaṭi ttuk kuḻi Eṭṭum kaṇṭiyatevar meṟppaṭi nila ṭa kuḻi nālaraiyum
kaṇṭiyatevar paṟṟil nilattil virippu nilattāl(k) kuḻi nālaraiyum meṟppaṭiyār puṉcey nilattukku nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ meṟppaṭi nilattukkum ṟku vāykkālukku kuḻi muṉṟu (nikki) nikkik kuḻi Añcum Āka viḷainilaṅ kuḻi Irupattāṟekāl puṉcey nilattu viṭṭa nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ kom maṭittiṭal kuḻi Añcarai pattaṅki tiruvaraṅkam ṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār meṟppaṭi nilattil viṭṭa kuḻi Āṟarai
muṟicceṭṭur vetanāyaka paṭṭaṉ meṟpaṭi nilattukkuḻi muṉṟarai Āka puṉcey kuḻi patiṉañcarai Āka ṟekālum puṉcey kuḻi toḷāyirattu nāṟpattoṉpataraiyum Itiṉiṉṟa teṅku Eḻupatu māviraṇṭu ṉelli Oṉṟukku kaṭamai(y)kku mutal koṇṭa viḷainilam kuḻiṉūṟṟāṟe kālukku nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻaṟumāvaraikkuk kaṭai ku māttāl paṇam pattoṉpataraiye Araikkālum
ṉellu Eṇpattu Aiṅkalamākap paṇam ṉāle Araikkāl ṉellu patiṉeḻukalaṉe Irutūṇi payaṟu mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻi teṅku Eḻupatukku teṅku Oṉṟukku paṇam Oṉṟaraiyāka paṇam ṉūṟṟañcu puñcey kuḻi toḷāyirattu ṉāṟpattoṉpataraikkuk kuḻi nūṟṟukku paṇam Iraṇṭākap paṇam pattoṉpatu māviraṇṭukkup paṇam Iraṇṭu nelli Oṉṟukku paṇam Oṉṟarai Ākap paṇam ṉūṟṟu muppatteḻearaikkāl
ṉellu patiṉ Eḻukalaṉe Irutūṇi payaṟu Aṟuṉāḻi nāṭṭu viniyokattu kku māttāl(p) paṇam Aiñca ṉṟekāl ṉellu Irukala ṉe tuṇippatakku ṉellu Eḻu kuṟuṇi sabhā viṉiyokattukku māttāl(p) paṇam pattāka paṇam Araikkāl ṉellu ṉāṟkkalamāka ṉelluk kalam Ākap paṇam muṉṟekāle Araikkāl ṉellu kalaṉe Eḻukuṟuṇi Ākap paṇam ṉūṟṟu muppattuṉālu
ṉellu pattoṉpatiṉ kalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi payaṟu Aṟunāḻikku ṉellu kuṟuṇi nāḻiyāka ṉellu laṉe kāṇi nāṉāḻi Itil kaārāl paṇam Aṟupat teḻu ṉellu Oṉpatiṉ kalaṉe Irutūṇi pacāṉam paṇam tteḻu ṉellu Oṉpatiṉ kalaṉe Irutūṇi nāṉāḻikkum Ivai Ivvūrk kaṇakku ṉeṟkuppaiyuṭaiyāṉ kaṇakku koyil piḷḷai Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.209 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
